sys_script.description: 2.6 STRY0091294 - TUP - duration should only be required if Suspense Date is Required 2.5 P3 STRY0084991 - TUP - Template form - Add "Tasker Type" field to the "Top Task Information" section STRY0080195 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploading documents to the My Documents tab.
sys_script.name: Template - onDisplay Set Defaults
